briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform decrypt KAT on AES engine.

listitem.para: Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform KAT on AES DPA countermeasure KAT.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform RSA encrypt KAT.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform SHA3 KAT.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform ECC sign verify KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve class(Prime - 0, Binary - 1)

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform encrypt KAT.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform RSA private decrypt KAT.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform ECC sign generate KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of elliptic curve class(Prime - 0, Binary - 1)

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for KAT.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kpt 07/18/22 Initial release 5.2 am 03/09/23 Replaced xsecure payload lengths with xmailbox payload lengths am 06/19/23 Added error code for failure cases 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings. pre 08/16/24 Added SSIT support 5.7 tbk 03/16/26 Added SMC support
